#+TITLE: List Edge Cases

* Unordered lists with dash

- Item 1
- Item 2
- Item 3

* Unordered lists with plus

+ Item 1
+ Item 2
+ Item 3

* Mixed markers at same level (lint warning)

- Item with dash
+ Item with plus
- Back to dash

* Nested lists

- Top level 1
  - Nested level 2
    - Nested level 3
      - Nested level 4
- Top level 2

* Star marker (must be indented)

  * Star item 1
  * Star item 2

* Ordered lists with period

1. First
2. Second
3. Third

* Ordered lists with paren

1) First
2) Second
3) Third

* Mixed ordered markers (inconsistent)

1. First with period
2) Second with paren

* Checkboxes

- [ ] Not done
- [X] Done
- [-] In progress
- [x] Lowercase x (should be uppercase X)

* Nested checkboxes

- [ ] Parent task [1/3]
  - [X] Sub-task 1
  - [ ] Sub-task 2
  - [ ] Sub-task 3

* Description lists

- Term 1 :: Description of term 1
- Term 2 :: Description of term 2
  Multi-line description continues here.
- Term 3 :: Short description

* List continuation

- Item 1
  Continuation of item 1 on next line.
  Still part of item 1.
- Item 2

* Empty list items

-
-
- Non-empty

* List with blank line (ends the list per spec)

- Item 1
- Item 2

- This is a NEW list, not continuation

* List immediately after heading
- No blank line needed per convention

* Deeply nested mixed markers

- Level 1 dash
  + Level 2 plus
    * Level 3 star
      - Level 4 dash again

* List at end of file
- Last item
